nasb.text: After him the Levites carried out repairs under Rehum the son of Bani. Next to him Hashabiah, the official of half the district of Keilah, carried out repairs for his district.

esv.text: After him the Levites repaired: Rehum the son of Bani. Next to him Hashabiah, ruler of half the district of Keilah, repaired for his district.

cnv.text: 再下一段由利未人巴尼的兒子利宏修築；接著的一段由管理半個基伊拉的區長哈沙比雅為他本區修築。

ccb.text: 再下一段由巴尼的儿子利宏带领的利未人修筑。 接下来，管理半个基伊拉的哈沙比雅修筑了自己的辖区。
